summary: Plan-only classification using the hydrated preflight artifact as live state. #80065 remains the canonical open issue for exposing auth cooldown/profile-rotation UI. #80521, #83496, and #91498 are related auth/provider configuration feature requests with distinct product scopes, not duplicates. Security-sensitive linked #80040 is routed to central security handling only.

actions.reason: #80065 is still the clearest live canonical for the auth profile-rotation UI/configuration visibility request.
#80521 is in the same control UI/auth-provider configuration family, but it tracks fallback model selection UX rather than auth cooldown/profile-rotation UI.
#83496 is related to auth-profile behavior but is a core auth-selection policy feature, not the same UI exposure request as #80065.
#91498 is related to auth-provider profile selection, but its root scope is model/runtime-scoped auth preference rather than auth cooldown/profile-rotation UI.
#80040 is a linked security-sensitive item and is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup mutations.
